scripts.dev:api:dynamodb: TODO_TABLE_NAME=personal-todos TODO_DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:8000 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=local AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=local AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-1 .venv/bin/python -m backend.todo_api.local_dev --storage dynamodb
